item.title: Gibson SG Standard Lefty electric guitar with case USA - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: left-handed solid-body usa-made gibson, with original case. no trades.

item.title: G&L Legacy LEFTY USA electric guitar strat style with case - $1,100 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed G and L strat, rare 3-bolt vintage. could use a set-up, but it's a great-sounding guitar. pots modified to function in right handed direction (clockwise-increase). includes hard case. includes tremolo arm. no trades, thank you.

item.title: Gretsch G6119 Tennessee Rose Lefty electric guitar Japan with case - $1,999 (Quincy)
item.description: Left handed Gretsch Tennesee Rose with bigsby. This guitar has been thoroughly gigged for over fifteen years. Had a professional fret level and dress, along with a pinned bridge (no longer free floating). Pickups upgraded to TV Jones Classic filtertrons. Original hardshell case included. No trades.

item.title: Eastman E20DL acoustic guitar dreadnought rosewood spruce lefty w/case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: left-handed eastman acoustic, with hardshell case. no trades.

item.title: Eastman T386 electric guitar semi-hollow lefty with hard case - $1,000 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed 335-type semi-hollow guitar from eastman. hard case included. no pickguard. sounds great, no trades, thank you.

item.title: Yamaha lefty acoustic guitar (FG720SL) - $275 (West Hempstead)
item.description: If you are a lefty guitarist (or aspiring guitarist) looking for a great value on a quality instrument this might be what you are after.

item.title: Lefty Left handed Schecter 12 strings guitar Diamond series TSH-12 - $850 (Winthrop)
item.description: Hi, love this guitar but just don't play it anymore. I've had a pair of EMG's installed by Eddie Carlino, great powerful sound. Push and pull pots for single/humbucker. Sound ranges from a Rickenbacker shimmer to a Gibson, as in Stairway to Heaven. The price, I believe is fair, just the EMG's plus labor cost aroud 450. If you're a lefty looking for that type of flexibility, you can't go wrong. There's a little ding in the back, won't interfere with performance or it's beauty. I prefer picking up in Winthrop MA 02152. But could also get a shipping quote from UPS, safely packaged and insured.

item.title: 2008 G&L S-500 USA Lefty Blonde Finish Guitar Ash Body / Maple NecK - $1,650 (Naugatuck)
item.description: Used, excellent condition April 2008 lefty S-500 USA build-to-order model. Swamp ash body, glossy tinted maple neck and maple fretboard, bone nut, MFD single coil pickups.

item.title: Lefty explorer style guitar - $350 (Fishkill)
item.description: Nice lefty tribute. Plays great. Will be sweet with a few upgrades.$350 or best offer.

item.title: Eastman T59/TV-RD left handed semi-hollow electric guitar - $1,600 (Quincy)
item.description: this is the higher end lefty Eastman 335-style offering, comes relic'd from the factory. includes original case. no trades.

item.title: 1980 Lefty Guild D40C with K&K Pickup - $1,100 (Murray Hill)
item.description: 1980 Guild D40C (Left-Handed), rare cutaway model, solid condition with play wear consistent with a player guitar of this vintage, string action is excellent (3/64" to 4/64" high E to Low E at the 12th fret - saddle height is 1/8"), equipped with a K&K Pure Mini bridge plate transducer pickup, sturdy hardshell case with locking keys, $1,100.

item.title: Eastman SB59 left handed electric guitar with case - $1,400 (Quincy)
item.description: lefty eastman les paul in great shape. includes case. no trades.

item.title: Agile AL-3100MCC Black P90 lefty wolfetone pickup upgrade with case - $500 (Quincy)
item.description: left handed single cutaway agile guitar with upgraded Wolfetone Meaner P90 pickup. includes hard case. no trades.

item.title: 100% ORIGINAL 1999/00 Fender LEFT HANDED LEFTY BLACK JAZZ J-Bass ROSEW - $549 (WEST ISLIP)
item.description: UP FOR YOUR CONSIDERATION IS THIS 100% ORIGINAL LEFT HANDED LEFTY Fender BLACK JAZZ J-Bass 1999-00 w/ ROSEWOOD/MAPLE Made n Mexico...HAS A GREAT TONE AND SOUND WITH A REAL NICE SMOOTH FEEL AND ACTION ON THIS STRAIGHT 20 FRET ROSEWOOD/MAPLE NECK...CONSIDERATION THIS GEM IS APPROX. 26 YEARS OLD AS SHOWN IN EXCELLENT CONDITION WITH MINOR SCUFFS, with NO DENTS, & NO CHIPS...JUST A REAL NICE LOOKING, PLAYING SOUNDING LEFT HANDED JAZZ BASS...

item.title: 1980s Made in Japan Fender Squier Left handed Stratocaster - $950 (Scarsdale)
item.description: 1980s Fender Squier made in Japan

item.title: Martin 000-15M Left-Handed Lefty - $1,050 (Clinton Hill)
item.description: Made in 2020, small scratches here and there, did my best to photograph them, the logo in the sound hole has been painted black, otherwise perfect condition, sounds and plays beautifully, has a K&K Pure Mini pickup installed, includes Hiscox road case, and a few extra strings too

item.title: Fender standard Stratocaster Lefty strung righty MIM 2004 - $425 (Bradford)
item.description: 2004 MIM Fender Standard Stratocaster. Black with maple neck. Left handed guitar with a nut swap and is strung for right handed play. Classic strat sound and neck plays great. Two chips in paint see pics. Very nice guitar that just doesn't get played.

item.title: LEFTY Epiphone SG Standard with hardshell case - $415 (Montpelier)
item.description: It's less than two years old; my son got a new guitar. Clean, plays well. Comes with an Epiphone hardshell case.

item.title: Warrior Custom Built Lefty 4 String Bass - $3,375 (Stratford)
item.description: Price Reduction!!!

item.title: Taylor Big Baby BBTe (LEFTY) - Acoustic-Electric - Excellent Condition - $425 (Lakewood)
item.description: Selling my Left-Handed Taylor BBTe (Big Baby Taylor). This is the "e" version, which means it comes factory-equipped with the ES-B electronics system, featuring a built-in digital tuner and volume/tone controls.

item.title: Lefty Gibson Les Paul Standard - $1,850 (Somerset)
item.description: Left-Handed Gibson Les Paul Standard - September 2021

item.title: washburn D10 SCE lefty acoustic electric - $300 (Brooklyn)
item.description: Lefty left handed .

item.title: Guitar Lot #4 - See prices in Ad - Updated 1/11 - $1 (Worcester)
item.description: Each Guitar works fine. Typical wear. Would trade for other guitars or basses; working or projects. Pick up in Worcester, Holden or Shrewsbury.

item.title: Lefty 1979 Fender Stratocaster w/ OG Case - Rare Olympic White - CL Gear Stash - $3,700 (East Village / Bushwick)
item.description: Letting go of my truly gorgeous and excellent playing 1979 Fender Stratocaster, complete with its original hard case. The Olympic White finish is original, and has several gradients ranging from creamy off-white to an off-yellow. The original pickups sound fantastic; the neck is straight; and the guitar plays just as a vintage Strat should. All components appear to be 100% original, though I am unable to verify the authenticity of the pickguard (please let me know if there's a way!); and the guitar is missing its whammy bar. The neck is a dream. There is some oxidation residue on the body from the back of the bridge plate; I'm sure it can be removed -- similarly the original 5-way switch exhibits slight oxidation, though it works beautifully. There aren't many original Olympic Whites out there from this era. Asking 3700. I'll do 3400 without the hard case, too. Thanks!

item.title: Left Handed BC Rich 'Masterpiece' Bich All-black-hardware - $750 (Bushwick)
item.description: Left Handed BC Rich 'Masterpiece' Bich

item.title: Deering 5-string Boston Banjo - Left Handed - $800 (Wakefield)
item.description: This is a professional-grade, Deering 5-string Boston banjo in excellent condition, except for some lacquer issues on the back (see pics).

item.title: Lefty no name strat - $125 (Hampton)
item.description: Lefty strat type guitar. Sounds great. $ 125. Like new

item.title: Fender Squire Sa-150 Guitar _ Left Handed - $80 (Lakewood Nj)
item.description: Lefty Guitar In Excellent Condition
